PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Continued To Jun-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt for Petitioner.

The Court stated that it needs to get an idea of any anticipated liabilities in order to address the issue of bond. Mr. Huysentruyt stated that he filed a declaration yesterday and that other than the mortgage there is $1,000.00 worth of credit card debt. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to June 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for review of said declaration.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Continued To Jun-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
